props.ChoiceText: A good horse made you useful and indebted in the same season.
props.ChoiceBio: A costly mount taught you that cavalry rank begins with horseflesh before it reaches honor.

0.TransitionText: Because a costly mount taught you that cavalry rank begins with horseflesh before it reaches honor, horseflesh, speed, and shock remained your proper element.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Cavalry, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a costly mount taught you that cavalry rank begins with horseflesh before it reaches honor, martial prestige hardened into knightly standing.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Knight, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a costly mount taught you that cavalry rank begins with horseflesh before it reaches honor, mounted reputation ripened into command.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Officer, but you may remain on your current path instead.
